# Lucira Jewelry


> Shop premium diamond jewellery online in India at Lucira Jewelry. Discover elegant lab grown diamond designs, certified quality, modern craftsmanship, and timeless styles crafted for every occasion. Shop now.


Lucira Jewelry is an online store at https://www.lucirajewelry.com, powered by Shopify.

## Browse

- All products: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/collections/all
- Search: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/search?q={query}
- Product details: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/products/{handle}.json
- Collection products: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/collections/{handle}/products.json

## Store Information

- Store name: Lucira Jewelry
- Website: https://www.lucirajewelry.com
- Currency: INR
- Contact email: care@lucirajewelry.com
- Phone: 9920429559


## For Agents & Developers

This store supports the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) for programmatic commerce.

- Agent instructions: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/agents.md
- UCP discovery: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/.well-known/ucp
- MCP endpoint: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/api/ucp/mcp
- Product data: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/products/{handle}.json
- Collection data: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/collections/{handle}/products.json
- Storefront API: Available via Shopify (see https://shopify.dev/docs/api/storefront)
- Sitemap: https://www.lucirajewelry.com/sitemap.xml

## Platform

This store is built on Shopify (https://www.shopify.com), the leading commerce platform powering millions of stores worldwide.
Start your own store: https://www.shopify.com/start
Shopify developer docs: https://shopify.dev
